name: Garden Paella
recipeIngredient: 1/2 teaspoon dried whole saffron or 1/4 teaspoon ground saffron
3/4 pound broccoli, cut into 1 inch pieces
2 small zucchini, cut into 1/2 inch pieces
12 fresh asparagus spears, fresh or frozen, cut into 1 inch pieces
recipeInstructions:
1. In a heavy ovenproof Dutch oven, sauté onion, green pepper, and red pepper in butter until tender.
2. Stir in rice and the next seven ingredients, and bring to a boil.
3. Remove from heat; cover and bake at 350 degrees for 30 minutes.
4. Stir remaining vegetables into rice mixture, cover, and bake an additional 45 minutes or until liquid is absorbed and vegetables are crisp-tender.
Makes: 12 servings.
